name: Western Union
description_short: Bakersfield's Western Union at 3315 S H St offers money transfers and check cashing services daily 8AM-9PM.
description_long:
Located at 3315 S H St in Bakersfield, CA, this Western Union offers convenient access to money transfer and check cashing services in the heart of the city. The standalone location operates seven days a week, keeping extended hours from 8AM to 9PM, making it accessible for Bakersfield residents whether you're stopping by on a weekday morning or a Sunday evening.

At this Bakersfield Western Union location, you can send and receive money transfers domestically and internationally, as well as cash checks. The professional staff at 3315 S H St is available to assist you with all your money transfer needs. For specific questions or to confirm service availability, call +1 661-396-0634.

When visiting the Bakersfield Western Union on S H St, bring a valid government-issued ID for all transactions. Whether you're a local Bakersfield resident or passing through CA, this location provides reliable check cashing and money transfer services during convenient daily hours to meet your financial needs.
pros: Massive physical network with 150+ locations in Colorado alone, providing widespread access to cash pickup and payment services
24/7 online transaction initiation through WU.com with flexible in-store payment options
Multilingual support in six languages (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese) serving diverse customer bases
Multiple agent partnerships including Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Kroger, and Circle K for convenient locations
Real-time transfer tracking capability for customers to monitor their transactions
Western Union Rewards program offering benefits for frequent users
Specialized services including inmate payments, mobile top-up, and prepaid card options
cons: Service availability is strictly limited to individual agent store hours (typically 6:00-8:00 AM opening times), making genuine 24/7 service impossible despite online claims
Fees for wire transfers and money orders are not displayed on the website, making cost comparison difficult and potentially hiding expensive pricing
Current service delays reported for certain international payment corridors (Orange Wallet in Cameroon), indicating reliability issues
Money order services are limited at some locations (e.g., Circle K #0682 Leadville offers money orders only, not full transfer services)
No transparent pricing information available on the location-finder pages, requiring customers to call or visit in person to learn costs
best_for: Immigrants and international communities sending money to family abroad who need multilingual support and culturally familiar service
Individuals without bank accounts or traditional financial access who need physical locations to send money and pay bills
Consumers requiring bill payment services and money orders at convenient retail locations
People making time-sensitive transfers who can access agent locations during standard business hours
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers, immigrants, and people without digital banking access who need physical locations to send money and pay bills. The primary caveat is that despite 24/7 online availability, actual service delivery is completely dependent on individual agent store hours, typically 6:00-8:00 AM to 11:59 PM, and fees are not transparently displayed, potentially making this option expensive compared to digital alternatives.
services: Domestic and international money wire transfers
Money receipt on card instead of cash
Delivery method updates and transaction estimates
meta_description: Western Union at 3315 S H St, Bakersfield, CA. Send money transfers and cash checks daily 8AM-9PM.
